tagline: High-performance multipurpose enterprise platform for governance, telemetry, and management of your organization.
trainingDesc: Immediate feedback, detailed explanations and no global time pressure. Ideal for building foundations.
mockDesc: Real conditions. 10 minutes, 30s per task, no way back. The definitive test.
sidebarNotice: Or utilize the left control sidebar panel
feature1Desc: Real-time tactical simulation with integrated global stopwatch and question-specific countdown logical loops.
feature2Desc: Complete enforcement of simple, incorrect-penalty, and weighted difficulty coefficient evaluation schemes.
feature3Desc: Strict Zod validation of content schemas and batch deduplication via SHA-256 hashes to preserve corpus purity.
examsDescription: Select a simulation template to begin your technical evaluation. All timing and scoring parameters will be enforced automatically.
loginHint: Sign in utilizing your federated credentials from ABDAuth
ingestionApiDesc: High-performance, non-blocking ingestion via REST API secured with inter-service Bearer tokens.
centralizedAuditDesc: Unified real-time query and inspection of technical and operational activity logs across the ABD ecosystem.
dynamicFilterDesc: Interactive filtering by source application (Auth, Quiz, Governance) and organization with automatic aggregation.
hotWhitelabelingDesc: Dynamic generation of HSL and YIQ Contrast custom tokens rendered during server-side SSR loops to secure zero visual flicker.
spaceHierarchiesDesc: Logic boundaries and role isolation calculated inside data repositories with recursive materialized subdivisions.
cryptographicSecurityDesc: Symmetric AES-256-CBC envelope encryption protecting customer configuration and sensitive billing fields in the database.
analyticsDesc: Unified dashboard and business telemetry across your entire organization.
authDesc: Federated identity provider with MFA, Passkeys and multi-tenant SSO support.
logsDesc: Immutable audit log and enterprise-scale event traceability.
filesDesc: Secure document management and polymorphic storage with retention control and versioning.
quizDesc: Adaptive assessment engine with advanced distractor analytics and performance tracking.
governanceDesc: Organization, permissions, licensing and tenant lifecycle management.
cryptfileDesc: Encryption and secure management of sensitive files with role-based access control.
noAppsDesc: Your user does not have permission to access any ecosystem applications in this organization.
onboardingDesc: Fill out this form and our team will review your application to join the platform.
onboardingSuccessDesc: Thank you! Your pre-registration has been received. Our team will review your application and send an activation link to {email}.
